hibernate-mapping.query: Select pba from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PaymentBatchAssoc as pba join fetch pba.MoneyMovementTransaction as mmt left join fetch pba.Company as c where mmt.Company.Id=pba.Company.Id and pba.AgencyCheckBatch = :agencyCheckBatch order by mmt.ReferenceNumber asc

Select pba from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PaymentBatchAssoc as pba join fetch pba.MoneyMovementTransaction as mmt left join fetch mmt.FinancialTransactionSet as ft left join fetch pba.Company as c where mmt.Company.Id=pba.Company.Id and ft.Company.Id=pba.Company.Id and pba.AgencyCheckBatch = :agencyCheckBatch order by mmt.ReferenceNumber asc
